description_long: This is a modern two-seater couch with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The seat and backrest are composed of two large, evenly sized cushions upholstered in a solid, dark gray fabric, providing a soft and comfortable appearance. The armrests are straight, boxy, and fully upholstered, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The base and rear panel of the couch are constructed from a light wood material, adding a natural contrast to the darker cushions. The legs are short and integrated into a continuous wooden sled base, giving the couch a sturdy and grounded presence. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing the functional and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-seater couch with dark gray cushions and a light wood sled base, featuring straight armrests and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large gray seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the wooden sled base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the cushions, and the light wood paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous light wood back panel and the full width of the sled base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion thickness, with clear visibility of the wooden side panel.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced, appear attached or tightly fitted with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, continuous sled base made of light wood, fully exposed and running the length of the couch for stability.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at full backrest height, fully upholstered in matching fabric with light wood side panels.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with two large, rectangular cushions, appearing attached and matching the seat cushions in style and material.

license_info.creator_display_name: 杭州维界科技有限公司
